calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Hearing On Pltf'S Application For Court Judgment; Summary Of The Case
Off Calendar Sep-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Jaemin Chang, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, ASSOCIATION FOR POSITIVE BEHAVIOR SUPPORT.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) WEB2WEB MARKETING, INC., a Delaware corporation, dba ACTEVA.COM; and PANKAJ GUPTA, an individual.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $170,268.94
Pre-Judgment Interest: $20,618.94
Attorney's Fees: $11,291.00
Costs: $920.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $203,098.88
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2014 Continued To Oct-29-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
